scripts.build: bun run build:apps && bun run build:router
scripts.build:apps: cd apps/image-crop && bun run build && cd ../image-generate && bun run build && cd ../image-resize && bun run build && cd ../image-grayscale && bun run build && cd ../image-transparent && bun run build && cd ../image-assets && bun run build && cd ../image-trim && bun run build && cd ../text-counter && bun run build && cd ../text-diff-checker && bun run build && cd ../text-deduplicate && bun run build && cd ../url-encoder && bun run build && cd ../htpasswd-generator && bun run build
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run deploy:all
scripts.deploy:all: bun run deploy:apps && bun run deploy:router
scripts.deploy:apps: cd apps/image-crop && bun run deploy && cd ../image-generate && bun run deploy && cd ../image-resize && bun run deploy && cd ../image-grayscale && bun run deploy && cd ../image-transparent && bun run deploy && cd ../image-assets && bun run deploy && cd ../image-trim && bun run deploy && cd ../text-counter && bun run deploy && cd ../text-diff-checker && bun run deploy && cd ../text-deduplicate && bun run deploy && cd ../url-encoder && bun run deploy && cd ../htpasswd-generator && bun run deploy
scripts.type-check: bun run type-check:router && bun run type-check:apps
scripts.type-check:apps: cd apps/image-crop && bun run type-check && cd ../image-generate && bun run type-check && cd ../image-resize && bun run type-check && cd ../image-grayscale && bun run type-check && cd ../image-transparent && bun run type-check && cd ../image-assets && bun run type-check && cd ../image-trim && bun run type-check && cd ../text-counter && bun run type-check && cd ../text-diff-checker && bun run type-check && cd ../text-deduplicate && bun run type-check && cd ../url-encoder && bun run type-check && cd ../htpasswd-generator && bun run type-check
scripts.clean: bun run clean:deps && bun run clean:build
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd apps/image-crop && bun install && cd ../image-generate && bun install && cd ../image-resize && bun install && cd ../image-grayscale && bun install && cd ../image-transparent && bun install && cd ../image-assets && bun install && cd ../image-trim && bun install && cd ../text-counter && bun install && cd ../text-diff-checker && bun install && cd ../text-deduplicate && bun install && cd ../url-encoder && bun install && cd ../htpasswd-generator && bun install && cd ../../packages/router && bun install
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
